## Kind

## Checklist

- [ ] Files are only under `community/<my-handle>/` (no edits to the core or another handle's namespace).
- [ ] Ran `python3 gates/scripts/sanitize_scan.py community/<my-handle>/` and it exited clean.
- [ ] Ran `python3 gates/scripts/format_lint.py .` and it exited clean.
- [ ] Matches the canonical schema for its kind (skills/, agents/, or tools/).
- [ ] No credentials, paths, IDs, hostnames, emails, or customer specifics anywhere.

## Sign-off (DCO)

- [ ] I certify this contribution is mine to share and contains no secrets, credentials, or private data.
